    FFJA ELECTRIC GUITARS (Sunburst Color )SB

    Product Description

    NEW ! FFJA ELECTRIC GUITARS

    • Mahogany Guitar body and Canada Maple Neck
    • Rosewood Fretboard and Colorful abalone dot Inlay
    • Classical JM pickups( Neck output 6.5K,Bridge pickup output 11.4K)
    • Nickel strings and bone nut
